The Grantor herein specifically reserves unto himself a life
estate in all the lands conveyed herein, together with the right to cut
and remove timber from said lands during his lifetime and together with
the right to receive all bonuses, delay rentals, and royalty payments
that may become due during his lifetime and being attributable to any

mineral interest that he may own under said lands.
